title: Comparative genomics of Chlamydomonas.
author: Craig RJ Hasan AR Ness RW Keightley PD
content: S-EPMC8226300 PMC8226300 Comparative genomics of Chlamydomonas. Despite its role as a reference organism in the plant sciences, the green alga Chlamydomonas reinhardtii entirely lacks genomic resources from closely related species. We present highly contiguous and well-annotated genome assemblies
